name: Melitzanokeftethes Kroketes (Eggplant Croque
recipeIngredient: Kefalotiri cheese, grated or Parmesan cheese, grated
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the eggplants and pierce them several times with a fork. Boil in lightly salted water until tender, then drain well.
2. Remove the skin from the boiled eggplant and mash the pulp.
3. Measure the mashed eggplant pulp.
4. Mix 2 cups of mashed eggplant with the remaining ingredients (bread crumbs, eggs, cheese, baking powder, parsley, onion, salt, and pepper) until well combined.
5. Shape the mixture into croquettes or patties.
6. Roll each croquette in cracker meal.
7. Fry the croquettes until golden brown.
